input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.7.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.7.2.3
            TITLE: bodywork must not contain openings into the cockpit from the front of the vehicle back to the

            CONTENT:
            rule T.7.2.3: Bodywork must not contain openings into the cockpit from the front of the vehicle back to the
T.7.2.3 Bodywork must not contain openings into the cockpit from the front of the vehicle back to the 
Main Hoop or Firewall.  The cockpit opening and minimal openings around the front 
suspension components are allowed.
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 70 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023

final_answer: Bodywork must not contain openings into the cockpit from the front of the vehicle back to the Main Hoop or Firewall. The cockpit opening and minimal openings around the front suspension components are allowed.
